title: Veri Energy Leads Programme to Advance Investable E-Fuel Production
content: Veri Energy, a UK-based independent energy transition and infrastructure company, has launched a major programme to assess investable pathways for the production of e-fuels. The initiative brings together leading global technology providers to evaluate and de-risk end-to-end e-fuel production systems using biogenic COâ‚‚Â and renewable electricity. With the UK Department for Transport projecting a 600,000-tonne shortfall in domestic SAF supply to meet its 10% SAF mandate by 2030, Veri Energyâ€™s integrated approach to e-fuel production and COâ‚‚ management provides a compelling proposition.
author: Analysts Account
